features.name: specify block with full connection timing path
features.description: Code should include a specify block containing a full connection timing path using the *> operator between source and destination signals

features.name: conditional timing path with if in specify block
features.description: Code should include a specify block with a conditional timing path using an if guard controlling when the timing annotation applies

features.name: specify data destination annotation with colon operator
features.description: Code should include a specify block timing path with data destination annotation using the colon operator to associate a data signal with the destination

features.name: timing values with min typ max triple notation
features.description: Code should include timing values expressed in min:typ:max triple format for rise and fall delays in a specify block
